colorScheme.rationale: High contrast conveys strength, professionalism, and elite positioning

typography.primary: Bold sans-serif, all-caps for category and sub-brand names
typography.characteristics: Strong, athletic, commanding presence. No decorative elements.

photography.lighting: Dark, dramatic lighting emphasizing athleticism and intensity
photography.subjects: Elite athletes in action, equipment, supplements, high-performance imagery

layoutPatterns.homepage: Large hero (3000x1500) + narrow divider (872x218) + wide category tiles (2x872x436) + narrow category grid (8x436x218)
layoutPatterns.categoryPages: Consistent hero (1872x400) + supporting banners (1-2) + product grid
layoutPatterns.subBrandPages: Hero banner (1872x400) + 2 supporting product highlight banners + product grid
layoutPatterns.contentRichPages: Multiple editorial sections (6-7+) interleaved with product grids for category/collection pages

hierarchyStructure.distribution: Sparse per-page editorial (avg 3.6 images) distributed across many pages rather than concentrated on few
hierarchyStructure.strategy: Deep specialization allows ESN to showcase multiple sub-brands as distinct product ecosystems

distribution.rationale: Homepage hero + navigation structure - high impact visual gateway
Brand storytelling hub - maximum editorial content showcasing company, athletes, values
Major category - substantive content depth for endurance product ecosystem
Core product category - dedicated editorial content with video

distribution.rationale: Template consistency - each sub-brand receives proportional presentation

distribution.page: Other category pages (VITALSTOFFE, PERFORMANCE, FOOD & SNACKS)
distribution.rationale: Moderate content depth for secondary categories
Pure product grid - functional catalog view

brandIdentity.visualLanguage: Black background + white text/logo creates stark, professional aesthetic. Large, bold ESN logo dominates. All-caps category naming (PROTEINE, VITALSTOFFE, AUSDAUER, etc.) emphasizes commanding authority. Dark sports photography with dramatic lighting creates aspirational, elite atmosphere suited to serious athletes.
brandIdentity.targetAudience: Serious athletes, bodybuilders, fitness enthusiasts, performance-driven individuals
brandIdentity.navigationPhilosophy: Deep specialization across 21 pages. Rather than a generic supplement store, ESN presents multiple sub-brands and product ecosystems as distinct offerings: PROTEINE has 5 sub-brands (DESIGNER WHEY, ISOCLEAR, FLEXPRESSO, ISOWHEY HARDCORE, CREATINE); FOOD & SNACKS has 3 sub-categories (RIEGEL, FLAVOR POWDER, SYRUPS). Each page gets tailored positioning and dedicated editorial content.
